general.languageDesc: Switch the UI and service-message language (applies immediately, syncs across devices).
general.tzNote: Affects: all timestamp display in the system, the current time injected into agent prompts, scheduled-task display, etc.
general.uiStyleNote: Terminal style switches to monospace fonts, square borders and a CRT scanline effect. Light/dark can still be toggled from the bottom-left.
general.yoloDesc: When on, file-write / file-edit / planning steps no longer raise approval cards — the agent just runs them. Best for solo, high-velocity iteration.
general.yoloWarning: ⚠️ Trusted agents/prompts only — the agent can write any file in your workspace. Don't enable on shared or public machines.
general.yoloScope: Only affects the Admin chat. Service (consumer/WeChat) endpoints are no-approval by default and are unaffected.
general.batchDesc: Upload an Excel sheet, configure columns to call the agent in batch, then watch progress and download results.
general.advOpRulesDesc: Show the “Operation Rules” tab in Prompt settings — customise the agent system prompt and capability prompts.
general.advMemorySoulDesc: Show the “Memory & Soul” tab in Prompt settings — configure the memory system and the soul filesystem.
general.apiKeysDesc: You need at least a Claude or OpenAI key to use the agent. Without an OpenAI key, image / video / speech generation will be unavailable. Keys are encrypted server-side, scoped per Admin and to all of that admin's agents.
general.apiKeysGroupIdPh: Required for TTS / Video, optional for LLM

profile.agentMemoryDesc: Information the agent recognises during chats and considers worth remembering across sessions (overwrite-style writes; the agent merges).
profile.agentMemoryPlaceholder:
This is the long-term info about you that the agent records via update_personal_memory (stable preferences, identity, habits, …).

· You can also edit or clear it manually
· When locked, the agent can no longer write here — useful when you want a stable snapshot
profile.agentMemoryLockedTip: The agent currently cannot write here. Unlock to let it maintain this section.
profile.agentMemoryUnlockedTip: The agent will update this area via update_personal_memory. Locking will reject writes.
profile.agentMemoryDoUnlock: Unlock — let the agent maintain it
profile.rulesDesc: Preferences and rules you define manually — the AI always follows them. History is kept and can be rolled back.
profile.rulesPlaceholder:
Write personal rules you want the AI to always follow, e.g.:

- Reply concisely and professionally
- Lead with the conclusion, then reasoning
- Give clear, actionable suggestions
- Always include risk caveats
- Reply in Chinese
profile.loadedToEditor: Loaded into editor — Save to apply

prompt.loadedToEditor: Loaded into editor — Save to apply

chat.selectOrCreate: Pick a conversation or start a new one
chat.voiceHint: Hold <1>Tab</1> to talk, release to send
chat.inputPlaceholder: Type a message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline, @ to mention a file)
chat.planModeHint: Plan Mode: plan first, then execute
chat.yoloAutoApprove: YOLO mode auto-approved HITL actions in this conversation
chat.prevRoundRunning: ⏳ The previous turn is still running in the background
chat.abortPrevSuccess: Requested termination of the previous turn
chat.queueRunning: “{{title}}” is still running — wait for it to finish or stop it before sending
chat.queueRunningPrev: The previous turn is still running — terminate it before sending
chat.queueApprovalPending: There are pending approvals — handle them or terminate before sending
chat.suggestionWhatCanYouDoMsg: What can you help me with? List your main capabilities and use cases.
chat.suggestionScheduler: How to set up scheduled tasks
chat.suggestionSchedulerMsg: How do scheduled tasks work? Walk me through configuring and using them.
chat.suggestionSubagentMsg: How do I create and manage subagents? Describe their purpose and configuration.
chat.suggestionServiceMsg: How do I create and distribute a Service? Walk me through publishing and management.

service.inputPlaceholder: Type a message... (you can paste images)
service.audioUnsupported: Your browser doesn't support audio playback
service.videoUnsupported: Your browser doesn't support video playback
service.convEmpty: No chats yet — send a message to start your first one
service.convDeleteConfirm: Remove this chat from this device? (Server data is kept.)

packages.title: Python Environment
packages.intro: Manage the Python environment for script execution. Each admin gets a dedicated venv pre-installed with system-level scientific libs (numpy, pandas, …); install whatever else you need. Service consumer scripts use the admin's environment.
packages.initFirstHint: First-time setup: this initialises a Python venv inheriting all system-installed packages (10–30s).
packages.installLabel: Install a Python package (version pin works, e.g. <1>requests==2.31.0</1>)
packages.installPlaceholder: Package name, e.g. beautifulsoup4 or openai>=1.0

backup.pageDesc: Each user can back up / restore their own data. Backups are scoped to the current user and never include anyone else's data.
backup.exportTip: Pick the modules to bundle into a ZIP backup and download. Useful for migrating to a new machine or for periodic backups.
backup.checkPrompt: Pick modules to bundle (everything except API Keys is on by default):
backup.includeMediaTip: Include images / audio / video under generated/ and query_appendix/images/. Disabling shrinks the backup a lot but loses any chat-referenced media.
backup.exportApiKeysTip: When ticked, the ZIP includes api_keys.PLAINTEXT.json — re-encrypted on import. Keep the backup safe.
backup.zipNote: ZIP usually compresses to 30%~70% of this size (media compresses poorly).
backup.exportConfirmDesc: The ZIP will contain plaintext API keys (only enable when you fully trust the destination). Proceed?
backup.importTip: Upload a previously-exported ZIP to restore or merge into the current account. Only your own data is touched.
backup.importNotice: Imports affect only the current user — other users are untouched.
backup.importDragText: Click or drag the backup ZIP here
backup.importDragHint: Only ZIPs exported by this app are supported (must contain _jellyfishbot_backup.json manifest)
backup.modeMergeDesc: Only fills in missing files; never overwrites existing content. Safe.
backup.modeOverwriteDesc: Modules in the ZIP fully replace current data; old files are moved to <1>.pre-restore-<time>/</1> as a snapshot.
backup.passwordPrompt: Enter your account password to confirm:
backup.dangerOverwrite1: Overwrite mode wipes all files in the selected modules and replaces them with the ZIP contents.
backup.dangerOverwrite2: Old files are moved to <1>users/<your-id>.pre-restore-<ts>/</1> as a snapshot — manual recovery is possible.
backup.importDetail: Import done (mode: {{mode}}) — wrote <1>{{written}}</1> files, skipped <3>{{skipped}}</3>, re-encrypted <5>{{keys}}</5> API keys.
backup.refreshHint: Refresh the page to load the new data.
backup.modHelpFilesystem: Your full /docs, /scripts, /generated, /soul filesystem — all agent work products live here.
backup.modHelpConversations: All Admin chat history + per-conversation attachments and generated images. Can be large.
backup.modHelpServices: Published Service configs + each Service's own conversations and scheduled tasks.
backup.modHelpTasks: All scheduled tasks under the Admin scope (cron / one-shot).
backup.modHelpSettings: System prompt, user profile, subagent configs, capability prompts, preferences, soul metadata, etc.
backup.modHelpApiKeys: ⚠ Exported as plaintext JSON (keep the backup private). Re-encrypted to this machine's ENC: format on import.

soul.title: Memory & Soul
soul.intro: Controls the agent's long-term memory and self-awareness. Memory Subagent manages notes; Soul Edit lets the file panel manage soul files directly.
soul.memorySubagentDesc: When on, the Memory Subagent can create / edit / delete notes and files under <1>soul/</1>. Conversation history stays read-only — the subagent can never modify past chats.
soul.soulFsDesc: When on, the <1>soul/</1> folder appears in the file panel — browse and manage all soul files directly. The agent can also read/write files under soul/ in chat.
soul.soulFsVisible: soul/ folder visible in the file panel
soul.soulFsAgentEdit: Agent can directly modify files under soul/
soul.consumerConvDesc: Allow Memory Subagent to read Service consumer chats. When off, memory scope is limited to the admin's own chats.

approval.planSubtitle: Agent is about to run {{count}} steps

voice.permissionFail: Cannot access microphone — check permission settings
voice.tipRecording: Click to stop & send, Esc to cancel

mention.hint: ↑↓ select · Enter / Tab insert · Esc dismiss

fileToken.openInBrowser: {{path}} · click to open in file browser

editDiff.fallbackNoOldString: old_string not found in original file — showing the model's replacement snippets only
editDiff.fallbackUnreadable: {{err}} — showing the model's replacement snippets only

fileops.audioUnsupported: Your browser doesn't support audio playback
fileops.videoUnsupported: Your browser doesn't support video playback
fileops.jsonParseFail: JSON parse failed: {{err}} (switched to source view)

treePicker.allShortcutDesc: When on, the checkboxes are ignored — the service can access everything under <1>{{root}}</1>
treePicker.missingPaths: ⚠ Selected paths missing: {{paths}} (will be removed on save)
treePicker.emptyDir: Empty directory. Upload files to <1>{{root}}</1> via the file panel first.
treePicker.selectionHint: Tick a folder = whole subtree allowed; tick a single file = just that file

folderPicker.title: Pick destination folder
folderPicker.disabledHint: Cannot pick this (it's the source folder or its descendant)
folderPicker.tipBottom: Tip: double-click a folder icon to drill in; selecting root = move/copy to /

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.subtitle: Sorry, this part of the app hit an unexpected problem. Try refreshing or going home; if it keeps happening, please send the error info to the admin.
errors.copySuccess: Error info copied — please send it to the admin
errors.copyFail: Copy failed — please select the text manually below

apiKeyWarn.title: AI model API key not configured
apiKeyWarn.desc: You need at least a Claude or OpenAI API key for the agent to work. Without an OpenAI key, image / video / speech features will be unavailable.

admin.regenKeyConfirm: Regenerate API key? The old one stops working immediately

wechat.title: WeChat Integration
wechat.configIntro: Configure PaaS credentials, then scan to bind a WeChat client running on Windows — the agent will receive and reply to messages automatically.
